sections.paragraph:
Original: בּשׁל

Transliteration: bâshal

Phonetic: baw-shal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to boil, cook, bake, roast, ripen, grow ripe
    1. (Qal)
      1. to boil, cook
      2. to grow ripe, ripen
    2. (Piel)
      1. to boil
      2. to cook
    3. (Pual)
      1. to be boiled
      2. to be sodden
    4. (Hiphil)
      1. to ripen
      2. ripen, brought to ripeness

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 292

Part(s) of speech: Verb
